title: Shower Head, Magichome High Pressure Shower Head with 5 Spray Modes, Turbocharged Design Powerful Shower Heads for Low Water Pressure
features: 【 High Pressure Shower Head 】- This high pressure shower head adopts advanced turbocharged technology, which can effectively improve your water pressure. This powerful shower head is suitable for low water pressure. Important note: There is a turbine in the shower head for pressure boosting, this may create a rattling sound inside, but it is normal for the item.

【 5 Modes Showerhead 】- This powerful shower head has 5 different spray modes to meet your different showering needs. Each mode is a different shower experience, which can satisfy your family's needs.

【 High Quality Material 】- This handheld shower head is made of high quality ABS material and multi-layer plating chrome finish, which makes shower head lightweight, durable, anti-corrosion and no fade, ensuring a long service life.

【 Easy to Clean 】- The silicone nozzles is anti-blocking and easy to clean, which is sutiable for hard water area. You can easily remove the limescale by simply wiping the nozzles by your hand or using a brush.
【 Easy to Install 】- This universal shower head is easy to install without tools; simply screw onto any standard shower hose( G1/2 interface).
